stages.title: Ask
stages.detail:
What happens: The UI sends your question to POST /query with the selected provider (Claude or GPT-4).

Also: POST /settings/provider, POST /transcribe (OpenAI Whisper by default), mic capture in the browser. Optional Ask rate limits and local operator analytics.

alternatives.label: Streamlit UI
alternatives.detail: Early prototype UI — replaced by React + Vite in web/dist/.

stages.title: Plan
stages.detail:
For Claude/GPT-4, LangGraph runs a planner that emits one or more retrieve intents (compare questions are a common case).

All planner queries are merged into one live wiki_search with multi-query fusion — not separate fetches per subtask.

alternatives.label: Linear only
alternatives.detail: One retrieval pass with the user question — fallback path or when the planner emits a single step.

stages.title: Retrieve
stages.detail:
Default (RETRIEVAL_MODE=live):

  • Fused MediaWiki queries (mechanic entities + topic terms, full question last)
  • Up to four title probes + title-overlap ranking of hits
  • Fetch up to LIVE_WIKI_MAX_PAGES pages, chunk in memory
  • Cross-encoder rerank → top RERANK_TOP_N chunks

Disk cache: data/live_cache/. Optional refine round if RETRIEVAL_REFINE_ENABLED=true.

alternatives.label: Local 18-page index
alternatives.detail: RETRIEVAL_MODE=local: Chroma dense + BM25 + RRF on the curated allowlist after poe-ingest — offline / regression use, not the live demo path.

alternatives.label: Hybrid local + live
alternatives.detail: RETRIEVAL_MODE=hybrid: try local index first; live fetch when local scores are weak.

alternatives.label: No rerank
alternatives.detail: Skip cross-encoder second pass — not used; rerank runs when the model loads.

stages.title: Generate
stages.detail:
The selected provider writes using only reranked wiki excerpts (PoE 1, excerpts-only system prompt).

LangGraph records timing_ms for plan, retrieval, and generation.

alternatives.label: Bedrock
alternatives.detail: AWS Bedrock via .env — not in the UI provider dropdown.

stages.title: Score
stages.detail:
Default: INLINE_EVAL=false — no judges on /query. Click Score response to run five LLM judges via POST /score.

Judges use the same 1200-char/chunk excerpts as generation. Scores do not change the answer or retrieval.

alternatives.label: Inline on every Ask
alternatives.detail: Set INLINE_EVAL=true to run all five judges automatically after each answer (slower).

stages.title: Respond
stages.detail: Always: Answer markdown, wiki source links, pipeline timing, Score button, quality metrics, agent trace, and LLM call log.
